pages.title: Fancy Text Generator — Copy & Paste Cool Fonts
pages.desc: Turn plain words into fancy fonts — bold, italic, cursive, bubble, upside-down and more. Type once, copy any style, and paste it on Instagram, TikTok, Discord, or your bio. Free, no signup.
pages.intro: Type anything below and it instantly appears in dozens of Unicode font styles. These aren't images or installed fonts — they're real characters, so you can copy a line and paste it straight into your Instagram bio, a TikTok caption, a Discord name, or a tweet.
pages.note: Heads-up: because these are special Unicode characters, a few of them show up as plain boxes (▯) on some phones, apps, or older browsers. If a style looks broken where you paste it, pick another one — bold, italic, and wide work almost everywhere.

pages.title: Cursive Text Generator — Copy & Paste Script Font
pages.desc: Make cursive text you can copy and paste. Type your words and get a flowing script font for Instagram, bios, and messages. Free, instant, nothing to download.
pages.intro: Type your text and watch it turn into flowing cursive script (𝓵𝓲𝓴𝓮 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓼). It's real copy-paste text, not a picture, so it works in bios, captions, and usernames. Every other style is shown below it too.
pages.note: Cursive uses Unicode math-script characters. Most modern phones render it cleanly, but a few older apps show empty boxes — if that happens where you paste, try Bold or Italic instead.

pages.title: Bold Text Generator — Copy & Paste Bold Font
pages.desc: Generate bold text that copies and pastes anywhere — Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Discord. Real Unicode bold characters, no image, no download. Free and instant.
pages.intro: Type your text to get 𝐛𝐨𝐥𝐝 characters you can copy and paste into posts, bios, and comments to make a line stand out. Bold is one of the most widely supported styles, so it renders on almost every app and device.
pages.note: This is Unicode bold, not the app's own bold button — handy in places that don't offer formatting, like bios and captions. A handful of apps that strip fancy characters may show plain letters instead.

pages.title: Italic Text Generator — Copy & Paste Italic Font
pages.desc: Create italic text you can copy and paste into Instagram, Discord, and more. Real Unicode italic and bold-italic characters. Free, instant, no signup.
pages.intro: Turn your words into 𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑐 characters you can copy and paste where the app has no italic button. Bold-italic is right below it if you want extra emphasis.
pages.note: Italic uses Unicode math characters, so digits usually stay upright and a couple of apps may show boxes. If a spot doesn't support it, Bold is the most reliable fallback.

pages.title: Bubble Text Generator — Circled Letters to Copy & Paste
pages.desc: Make bubble text with circled letters (Ⓐⓑⓒ) you can copy and paste. Outline and filled bubble styles for usernames, bios, and posts. Free and instant.
pages.intro: Wrap every letter in a circle — outline bubbles (ⓑⓤⓑⓑⓛⓔ) and solid filled bubbles are both shown below. Type once and copy whichever fits your vibe.
pages.note: Filled bubbles only exist for capital letters in Unicode, so that row uses capitals throughout. Some older apps render circled letters as boxes — the outline style is the more compatible of the two.

pages.title: Small Text Generator — Tiny Caps & Superscript to Copy
pages.desc: Generate small text — small caps (ᴛɪɴʏ) and tiny superscript letters — that you can copy and paste. Great for aesthetic bios and captions. Free, instant.
pages.intro: Shrink your words into ꜱᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄᴀᴘꜱ or even tinier ˢᵘᵖᵉʳˢᶜʳᶦᵖᵗ letters — both are real copy-paste characters, popular for aesthetic bios and captions. The superscript and subscript rows are just below the small-caps one.
pages.note: A few letters (like small-caps X and superscript Q) have no dedicated Unicode glyph, so they fall back to the normal character. Some apps also show these as boxes.

pages.title: Wide Text Generator — Full-Width (Vaporwave) Font to Copy
pages.desc: Make wide text with full-width characters (Ｗｉｄｅ) you can copy and paste. The classic vaporwave / aesthetic spacing look. Free, instant, no download.
pages.intro: Stretch your text into ｆｕｌｌ－ｗｉｄｔｈ characters for that spaced-out vaporwave look. There's also a simple 'spaced out' row below that just inserts gaps between letters.
pages.note: Full-width characters come from the CJK typography range and are very widely supported. On narrow screens the extra width may wrap to the next line — that's expected.

pages.title: Strikethrough Text Generator — Cross-Out Text to Copy & Paste
pages.desc: Add a line through your text (s̶t̶r̶i̶k̶e̶) and copy-paste it anywhere — Discord, Instagram, messages. Uses Unicode combining marks. Free and instant.
pages.intro: Draw a line straight through your words (l̶i̶k̶e̶ ̶t̶h̶i̶s̶) so you can 'cross out' text in places with no formatting button. An underline version is shown below it.
pages.note: This works by adding a combining stroke to each character. It renders in most modern apps, but a rare few (or plain-text fields) may drop the line or show odd spacing.

pages.title: Underline Text Generator — Underlined Text to Copy & Paste
pages.desc: Underline your text (u̲n̲d̲e̲r̲l̲i̲n̲e̲) and copy-paste it into apps with no formatting. Uses Unicode combining marks. Free, instant, no signup.
pages.intro: Put a line under every character (l̲i̲k̲e̲ ̲t̲h̲i̲s̲) to underline text where the app gives you no button for it. The strikethrough version sits right below.
pages.note: The underline is a combining mark added to each character. Most apps show it fine; a few plain-text spots may strip it. Copy the whole line to keep the effect intact.

pages.title: Upside Down Text Generator — Flip Your Text to Copy & Paste
pages.desc: Flip text upside down (uʍop ǝpısdn) and copy-paste it into bios, posts, and messages for a fun effect. Free, instant, nothing to install.
pages.intro: Flip your words so they read upside-down (ʇxǝʇ ʎɯ ǝʞᴉl) — the letters are swapped for look-alikes and the whole line is reversed so it reads correctly when rotated. Copy and paste it anywhere.
pages.note: A few characters have no flipped look-alike and stay as-is. Some fonts render the substitute glyphs slightly differently, but the upside-down effect comes through in most apps.

pages.title: Mirror / Reverse Text Generator — Backwards Text to Copy
pages.desc: Reverse your text so it reads backwards (txet rorrim) and copy-paste it anywhere. Simple, instant character reversal. Free, no signup.
pages.intro: Flip your text back-to-front so it reads in reverse (siht ekil). This simply reverses the character order — great for puzzles, usernames, or a quick backwards message. Copy and paste the result anywhere.
pages.note: This reverses the order of characters; it doesn't create true mirrored letter shapes (those don't exist for most letters in Unicode). Every character stays fully readable.

pages.title: Case Converter — UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title & Sentence Case
pages.desc: Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, and aLtErNaTiNg caps. Copy the result with one click. Free and instant, no signup.
pages.intro: Paste or type your text to switch it between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, and mocking aLtErNaTiNg caps — then copy the version you need. The fancy Unicode styles are shown below the case options.
pages.note: Case conversion produces plain, ordinary text that pastes cleanly everywhere — no special characters, no compatibility worries.
